ai.title: AI Cooking Assistant
ai.placeholder: Ask about cooking, meal plans, or recipes...
ai.welcome: Hi! Tell me what you need — import a recipe URL, plan your week, update your pantry, or ask what you can cook. I'll handle it and show you what changed.
suggestedPrompts: What can I cook with what I have?
Plan dinners for the rest of this week
Import a recipe from a URL
Add chicken, rice, and broccoli to my pantry
ai.demoWelcome: Hi! Tell me what you need — plan dinner from your pantry, import a recipe, or ask what you can cook. Try a prompt below.
demoSuggestedPrompts: What can I cook with what I have?
Plan dinners for the rest of this week
Add chicken, rice, and broccoli to my pantry
ai.demoFallback: Great question! Sign up free to get personalized answers based on your pantry, family preferences, and calendar.

demoResponses.What can I cook with what I have?: You have chicken breast, rice, broccoli, and soy sauce in your pantry. How about **Garlic Soy Chicken & Broccoli**? About 25 minutes — I only added garlic to your shopping list.
demoResponses.Plan dinners for the rest of this week:
Here's your plan — skipping spicy meals (Alex's preference) and using your expiring spinach:

• Mon: Lemon herb chicken & rice
• Tue: Spinach lasagna
• Wed: Veggie stir-fry with tofu
• Thu: Slow-cooker chili
• Fri: Fish tacos (kid-friendly)

Added 6 items to your grocery list.
demoResponses.Add chicken, rice, and broccoli to my pa:
Done — updated your pantry:

• +2 lb chicken breast
• +1 bag rice
• +1 head broccoli

I'll prioritize these in your next meal plan.
